attempts.strategy: rfl-foundation pushforward_μ_eq: pushforward μ reduces definitionally to the lighter restrictScalars μ on the strongly-monoidal pushforward₀OfCommRingCat objects (μIso = refl)
attempts.code_tried: μ (pushforward φ) A B = μ (restrictScalars φ') (pushforward₀OfCommRingCat F R₀ |>.obj A) (... B) := by rfl
attempts.insight: BREAKTHROUGH: the pushforward μ is DEFINITIONALLY the restrictScalars μ on pushforward₀ objects, because pushforward = pushforward₀ ⋙ restrictScalars and pushforward₀ is strongly monoidal with μIso = refl. This was the discovery that unlocked the lemma — refuting the prior '~150-LOC extendScalarsComp build' estimate.

attempts.strategy: Final assembly: hom_ext + tensor_ext, comp_μ, pushforward_μ_eq×2, split composite hom application, then restrictScalars_μ_app + atom-helper erw to avoid whnf explosion
attempts.code_tried: refine PresheafOfModules.hom_ext (fun W => ?_); refine ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext (fun m n => ?_); rw [Functor.LaxMonoidal.comp_μ, pushforward_μ_eq, pushforward_μ_eq, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]; erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]; rw [restrictScalars_μ_app (R := S₀) (S := F.op ⋙ R₀)]; erw [hinner]; erw [houter]
attempts.goal_before: (μ (restrictScalars φ) ... .app W ≫ (pushforward φ).map (μ (restrictScalars ψ) ...).app W) (m ⊗ₜ n) = ... (m ⊗ₜ n)
attempts.insight: Direct rw/erw/simp [restrictScalars_μ_tmul] whnf-explodes (>200k heartbeats even at 2M) because pushforward₀ section objects are huge. Robust pattern: instantiate an atom-stated helper with the goal's concrete heavy objects as EXPLICIT args into a `have`, then `erw [that_have]` — erw matches only residual defeq, never whnf-s the heavy objects. HO-match flakiness fixed by pinning implicits (R := S₀) (S := F.op ⋙ R₀) (inner-vs-outer forget₂ association). Verified axiom-clean: {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}.
